title: Badge anomaly + unusual network login
summary: Failed badge access after hours followed by VPN login from unfamiliar geography for the same user.
businessImpact: Potential insider or credential compromise requiring joint SOC/PSOC escalation.

title: Construction project + elevated cyber incidents
summary: Secure space build pending authorization overlaps with increased temporary vendor access and endpoint alerts.
businessImpact: Operational disruption risk if vendor access controls are not tightened before kickoff.

title: Overdue inspection + open POA&M drift
summary: Annual self-inspection is overdue while related TEMPEST and training remediation items remain open.
businessImpact: Regional consistency and audit readiness are degrading.
